# Portfolio Website

Professional portfolio website with maroon and beige color scheme.

## Setup for GitHub Pages

1. Create a new repository named `yourusername.github.io`
2. Upload all files to the repository
3. Go to Settings > Pages
4. Select "Deploy from a branch" and choose `main` branch
5. Your site will be live at `https://yourusername.github.io`

## File Structure

- `style.css` - Main stylesheet (shared across all pages)
- `index.html` - Homepage
- Add more pages as needed (about.html, projects.html, etc.)

## Color Scheme

- Maroon: #550000 (menu bar, links)
- Beige: #EBDDBE (active menu item)
- Black: #000000 (text)
- White: #FFFFFF (background)

## Customization

1. Edit navigation links in each HTML file
2. Update `<h1>Your Name</h1>` in the nav section
3. Mark current page with `class="active"` on the nav link
4. All pages should reference `style.css` for consistent styling
